/app/[locale]/page.title: Aynu itak suy a=eywanke kuni kusu...
/app/[locale]/page.description: aynu.io ka ta, tane oka utar Aynu itak isaykano eywanke kuni kusu ci=kar p ci=sapte wa oka=as ruwe ne. Neanpe anak, <link>Ryo Igarashi</link>, tun ren utar kar wa epunkine p ne ruwe ne.
/app/[locale]/page.apps_desc: Tane pakno ci=kar wa ci=sapte p ene an hi. A=esinap nukar rusuy kur anak, un=nure wa un=kore yan.
/app/[locale]/page.elsewhere_desc: Tan sayto mosma anak, kasike ta a=i=pirasa sayto ene an hi.
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_tunci: Aynu itak or wa Sisam itak or un itak tupte kuni aeywankep
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_kampisos: Aynu itak a=hunara kuni aeywankep. Pirkano a=numke kusu iesoye=an pe ka easkay
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_minecraft_ainu: Aynu itak ani Minecraft sinot=an kuni resource pack
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_ainu_corpora: Oro ta itak 1,700,000 akkari oka Sisam itak Aynu itak uomare p
/app/[locale]/page.app_entry_ainu_utils: Kikay or ta Aynu itak ani usa okay pe ki kuni aeywankep ne ruwe ne. Rust, JavaScript, Python or ta an
/app/[locale]/page.ethics_desc: 私たちのプロジェクトの倫理的立場について、近日中に説明を公開する予定です。
